title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: Rust AI agent where every context token earns its place. Self-learning skills, temporal graph memory, cascade quality   routing, OWASP AI security. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF. MCP + ACP. One binary.

title: knirski/auto-pr
summary: Auto-create PRs from conventional commits on ai/* branches. Parses commits, fills PR template with Ollama summaries.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: Local Deep Research achieves ~95% on SimpleQA benchmark (tested with GPT-4.1-mini). Supports local and cloud LLMs (Ollama, Google, Anthropic, ...). Searches 10+ sources - arXiv, PubMed, web, and your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: neondatabase/examples
summary: Examples and code snippets demonstrating common ways of integrating Neon with various frameworks and languages.

title: A2G-Dev-Space/Local-CLI
summary: AI Coding Assistant CLI for offline enterprise environments - Local LLM platform with Plan & Execute architecture, Supervised Mode, and auto-update system

title: Dicoangelo/meta-vengine
summary: Multi-provider AI routing engine with decision quality scoring. Routes queries to Claude/GPT-4/Gemini based on task type, cost, and performance. Self-improving via pattern analysis.

title: miclaldogan/bantzv2
summary: Bantz won't be a helper; he will be your Host. Your computer will become his studio, and your tasks will give the "entertainment." He won't just execute code; he will "pull strings" behind the scenes with a smile that you can hear through the text.

title: BaiGanio/aperio
summary: One brain. Every AI agent. Nothing forgotten. — Self-hosted memory layer via MCP + Postgres + pgvector

title: howlerops/iron-rain
summary: Multi-model orchestration for terminal-based coding agents

title: tobocop2/obsidian-lilbee
summary: Talk to your vault — chat with your notes, PDFs, code, and 150+ formats using local AI. Privacy-first, powered by Ollama.

title: sklaff2a-gif/promethee-nexus
summary: Systeme multi-agents IA autonome avec cerveau bio-inspire : Brain VM, Global Workspace (Baars), connectivity matrix, LIF scoring, Hebbian contextuel, signaux descendants, rappel causal, prediction RPE. 20+ organes (cardiac, prefrontal, dopamine, thalamus...). Python/FastAPI/Ollama, single PC.

title: Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm
summary: The all-in-one AI productivity accelerator. On device and privacy first with no annoying setup or configuration.

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

title: QuietFireAI/ClawCoat
summary: Real Time Local-First Gateway for OpenClaw | Self-hosted | Keep your data where it belongs

title: Ascendral/codebot-ai
summary: Safe, local-first autonomous coding agent. Policy-governed, audit-trailed, sandboxed. Works with any LLM.

title: overcuriousity/wintermute
summary: Wintermute is a totally harmless, Matrix-based AI assistant designed to learn, adapt and get complex tasks done. Focus on efficiency and small-local llm.

title: RedsonNgwira/sonder
summary: Self-hosted social simulation engine. Describe a scene. AI agents with real personalities spawn inside it and start living.

title: albertdobmeyer/cobol-legacy-ledger
summary: Learn COBOL through a live banking system — 18 programs, 6-node settlement network, real-time simulation, Python read/write bridge, SHA-256 tamper detection, AI tutor (Ollama + Claude), static analysis with orthogonal call graphs, and a glass morphism web console. 800 tests.
